gārhapata (von gṛhapati) gaṇa aśvapatyādi zu  P. 4,1,84 . n. die Stellung, Würde des Hausherrn  ŚAT. BR. 5,3,3,3 . 4,3,15 .  PAÑCAV. BR. 10,3 .  KĀTY. ŚR. 1,6,16 . 22,4,7 . tasya gārhapate dīkṣeranbhakṣāṃścānubhakṣayeyuḥ  LĀṬY. 8,6,7 _in_ Ind. St. 1,52 .
— Vgl. kuru˚.
